name: General Consulting Engagement
description: Versatile proposal template for strategic consulting engagements — workshops, assessments, roadmaps, and advisory programs. Adaptable to technology, operations, and digital transformation contexts.
author: ScopeForge

details.title: Consulting Engagement Proposal
details.subtitle: Strategic assessment, roadmap development, and advisory to accelerate your transformation
details.recommendation: Begin with a focused discovery and assessment to build a shared fact base, then develop a prioritized roadmap aligned with your strategic objectives.
executiveSummary: A structured consulting engagement gives your leadership team a clear, evidence-based view of where to invest for maximum impact.
We combine stakeholder insights with market analysis to produce an actionable roadmap — not just a slide deck.
The engagement is designed in phases so you can validate value before committing to the full program.
whatWeHeard: Leadership needs a shared, evidence-based view of strategic priorities.
Multiple initiatives compete for limited resources without clear ROI comparisons.
The organization wants to move faster but needs alignment before scaling.
details.investmentSummary: Total investment ranges from $45K for a focused strategy engagement to $80K for a 3-month advisory program, with actionable deliverables at each phase.

valueProposal.headline: Align leadership on a shared, evidence-based strategic roadmap
valueProposal.narrative: Our engagement gives your team a clear picture of where to invest, what to deprioritize, and how to sequence initiatives for maximum impact — built on stakeholder insight, not just frameworks.
unlocks: Strategic clarity — a shared, data-backed view of priorities across leadership
Faster decisions — structured framework for initiative evaluation and trade-offs
Execution confidence — a roadmap with clear owners, timelines, and success metrics

valueSources.label: Strategic decision acceleration
valueSources.currentState: Leadership meetings spend hours debating priorities without shared data
valueSources.futureState: Decisions grounded in stakeholder data, market benchmarks, and ROI models

valueSources.label: Initiative prioritization efficiency
valueSources.currentState: Teams pursue parallel initiatives without clear sequencing or trade-off criteria
valueSources.futureState: Prioritized roadmap with explicit dependencies and resource allocation

buildPlan.name: Stakeholder discovery
buildPlan.description: Interview key stakeholders to build a fact base of current-state challenges, opportunities, and strategic context.

buildPlan.name: Assessment & analysis
buildPlan.description: Synthesize findings, benchmark against market data, and identify high-leverage opportunities.

buildPlan.name: Strategy & roadmap development
buildPlan.description: Develop a prioritized roadmap with owners, timelines, and success metrics.

buildPlan.name: Executive workshop & handoff
buildPlan.description: Facilitate an executive workshop to align on priorities and establish governance for execution.

actualDeliverables.title: Assessment report
actualDeliverables.description: Comprehensive analysis of current-state challenges, opportunities, and benchmark data.

actualDeliverables.title: Strategic roadmap
actualDeliverables.description: Prioritized initiative roadmap with dependencies, owners, and resource requirements.

actualDeliverables.title: Executive workshop
actualDeliverables.description: Facilitated session to align leadership on priorities and establish execution governance.

actualDeliverables.title: Execution playbook
actualDeliverables.description: Guide for ongoing initiative management, including governance model and measurement framework.
acceptanceCriteria: Team can operate governance model independently

pricing.summary: Engagement phases aligned with deliverables. Strategy & Roadmap at $45K; full advisory at $80K.

terms.paymentTerms: 40% upon signing, 30% at assessment delivery, 30% at workshop completion.
startConditions: Access to leadership team for interviews
assumptions: Key stakeholders are available for 60-minute interviews during the discovery phase.
Leadership team participates in the executive workshop.
Historical performance data is available for benchmarking.
exclusions: Ongoing advisory beyond the agreed program period.
Proprietary market research reports (available at cost if needed).
clientResponsibilities: Provide access to strategic documents and performance data.
Ensure leadership team attends the executive workshop.
terms.changeControl: Scope adjustments during the engagement are handled via written agreement between the project leads.
terms.expiration: This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

footer.confidentiality: This proposal is confidential and prepared exclusively for {{COMPANY_NAME}}.
footer.contact: Questions? Reach out to your ScopeForge account team.

nextSteps: Schedule a 30-minute alignment call to review scope and timeline.
Share any existing strategic documents or assessments.
Confirm executive sponsor and stakeholder availability.
